steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the year Yosemite Falls was completed. The relevant note says the painting was completed in 1930.

steps.title: Keep the year
steps.content: Choice A mentions Tanaka's location and medium, choice B only says he created a notable painting, and choice D names the sumi-e method. None includes the required completion year. The remaining choice names the painting and gives 1930. The answer is C.
